name: 02_triggered_preserves_count
description: Guard: when is_triggered=True, the stop-check block is skipped (already exited). Count preserved, hit=False.
derivation: is_triggered=True -> the `if armed and not triggered:` guard fails on the SECOND clause (not triggered is False). The block is skipped entirely; below_stop_count is preserved at 1. Hit is False. The other inputs would trivially satisfy the condition if reached (current_return -10.0 <= -2.10 is TRUE, prob_beating 5.0 < 60.0 is TRUE) -- but is_triggered=True blocks all of that.
